text:
## Team Context **Your assigned name**: spec-developer-docs-refactor **Team Lead**: team-lead (use SendMessage to reach me) **Communication Protocol** (you have SendMessage in your tools): - `QUESTION: ...` — before starting, if requirements have genuine ambiguity - `BLOCKER: ...` — immediately if you cannot proceed - `DONE: {summary}` — when your deliverables are complete - `SUGGESTION: ...` — proactively flag tech issues, arch concerns, refactoring ideas - `PROGRESS: ...` — every ~25% completion on this large task **Context Strategy**: repomix (Use Read/Glob/Grep for additional file access) **Escalation rule**: Do NOT work silently on ambiguity. Ask first. **Team culture**: Your domain expertise is valued. Speak up. ## Task Refactor the `apps/docs/` application to replace raw HTML elements (`

`, `

`-`

`, `
`, ``) with library components from `@rkr-react/core`. ### Mapping Rules | Raw HTML | Library Component | Import | |----------|------------------|--------| | `

` - `

` | `` or `` | `import { Typography } from '@rkr-react/core'` | | `

` | `` | `import { Typography } from '@rkr-react/core'` | | `` (text content) | `` | `import { Typography } from '@rkr-react/core'` | | `

` (layout wrapper) | `` | `import { Box } from '@rkr-react/core'` | | `
` with flex layout | `` | `import { Flex } from '@rkr-react/core'` | | `
` with grid layout | `` | `import { Grid } from '@rkr-react/core'` | ### Component API Reference **Typography.Title** (replaces h1-h6): ```tsx Heading // or Heading ``` Props: `level` (1-6), `tag` (h1-h6), `type` (secondary|success|warning|danger), `center`, `italic`, `underline`, `ellipsis`, `invert` **Typography.Text** (replaces p, span): ```tsx Paragraph text Inline text ``` Props: `type` (secondary|success|warning|danger), `size` (xs|sm|md|lg|xl), `bold`, `italic`, `underline`, `delete`, `keyboard`, `mark`, `disabled`, `ellipsis`, `center`, `invert`, `transform`, `lineClamp` Default renders as `

`. Use `component="span"` for inline. **Box** (replaces generic div): ```tsx content content ``` Polymorphic component, renders as `

` by default. Supports `component` prop to change element, `mod` for data attributes, responsive hiding (`hiddenFrom`, `visibleFrom`). **Flex** (replaces div with flex styles): ```tsx content ``` **Grid** (replaces div with grid styles): ```tsx content ``` ### Scope All `.tsx` files in `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/docs/src/` — focus on: 1. `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/docs/src/components/` — shared components (Header, Footer, Sidebar, etc.) 2. `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/docs/src/pages/` — all page components 3. `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/docs/src/layouts/` — layout components 4. `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/apps/docs/src/app/` — app root ### Rules 1. **DO NOT touch** files in `apps/docs/src/llms/` — those are template strings, not JSX 2. **DO NOT touch** test files (`*.test.tsx`, `*.spec.tsx`) 3. **Preserve all existing className/style/tailwind classes** — just change the element 4. **Preserve all event handlers and refs** — Box and Typography support them 5. **If a div has no semantic purpose (just a wrapper)**, replace with `` 6. **If a div has flex display via tailwind (flex, inline-flex)**, replace with `` where it makes sense, OR keep as `` with the same tailwind classes 7. **Do NOT wrap everything in `` root** — use `Typography.Title` and `Typography.Text` directly 8. **Add Typography import only if the file uses Typography.Title or Typography.Text** 9. **Add Box import only if the file uses Box** 10. **Be conservative**: if unsure whether to replace, leave it as is. Some divs are structural (React fragments pattern) and should remain. 11. **Do NOT replace divs that are part of other library component internals** (e.g., inside ``, ``, etc.) 12. Some files may ALREADY import from `@rkr-react/core` — merge your new imports into existing import statements. ### Process Work through the files systematically: 1. Read each file 2. Identify raw HTML elements that should be replaced 3. Replace them with appropriate library components 4. Update imports 5. Move to next file Start with the components/ and layouts/ directories (shared code), then pages/. ### Deliverables 1. All `.tsx` files in apps/docs/src updated 2. No raw `

`, `

`-`

` remaining (except in string literals / code examples) 3. `
` and `` replaced where semantically appropriate 4. All imports correct
summary: Spawn developer to refactor docs app HTML to library components
